metadata.purpose: Verify customer identity and assess risk for regulatory compliance
metadata.trigger: New customer application received via Client Portal or email
metadata.scope: All business segments — new customer onboarding and periodic KYC reviews

process_steps.name: Customer Application Received
process_steps.description: Relationship Manager receives new customer application via Client Portal or email. Log in Salesforce within 2 hours.

process_steps.name: Initial Document Collection
process_steps.description: RM requests identification documents (passport/ID, proof of address, corporate docs). Documents must be received within 5 business days.

process_steps.name: Data Entry into CRM
process_steps.description: RM enters customer details into Salesforce CRM, completes mandatory fields, attaches scanned documents.

process_steps.name: AML Screening
process_steps.description: Compliance Officer runs customer through World-Check ONE screening. Screen all beneficial owners >25% shareholding.

process_steps.name: Risk Assessment
process_steps.description: CO assigns risk rating (Low/Medium/High/Prohibited) based on Risk Rating Matrix.

process_steps.name: Enhanced Due Diligence
process_steps.description: For High-risk customers: gather additional documentation per EDD checklist, verify source of funds/wealth, obtain sign-off from Compliance Manager AND Head of Compliance.

process_steps.name: Approval Decision
process_steps.description: Low/Medium risk: Compliance Officer approval. High risk: Compliance Manager + Head of Compliance. Rejections require written justification.

process_steps.name: Customer Notification
process_steps.description: Send approval/rejection letter within 24 hours using standard templates. Do not disclose screening findings for rejections.

process_steps.name: Account Activation
process_steps.description: Operations team activates account in T24 Core Banking System.

process_steps.name: Periodic Review Scheduling
process_steps.description: System schedules next KYC review and enables transaction monitoring alerts.

pain_points.impact: Inefficiency and potential for data errors

pain_points.description: World-Check ONE integration sometimes times out
pain_points.impact: Delays in processing, need to retry screening

pain_points.description: No automated reminder for periodic reviews
SharePoint sync delays causing duplicate uploads
T24 batch processing causes overnight activation delays
pain_points.impact: Customers cannot use account until next business day

pain_points.description: No automated notification to RM when screening/approval completes
pain_points.impact: RM spends ~20 min/day on informal Compliance coordination with no audit trail

pain_points.description: CRM pipeline dashboard too slow, driving Excel shadow tracker
pain_points.impact: RM maintains shadow Excel tracker at ~30 min/day; data duplication risk, single point of failure

pain_points.description: No self-service application status for clients, creating RM call overhead
pain_points.impact: 3-4 client status calls/day (~15-20 min); Client Portal lacks status tracking

pain_points.description: Borderline risk rating cases require informal CO→CM escalation with no documented criteria
pain_points.impact: Potential delays and inconsistent ratings; no documented escalation path for ambiguous cases

controls.name: Four-eyes principle on high-risk approvals
controls.description: High-risk customer approvals require review by Compliance Manager AND Head of Compliance

controls.name: Audit trail in CRM
controls.description: All status changes logged in CRM for audit purposes

controls.name: Mandatory fields validation
controls.description: System validates all required fields before submission

controls.name: Screening results archival
controls.description: All screening results archived for 7 years

systems.name: Salesforce CRM
systems.description: Customer relationship management and KYC data entry

systems.name: T24 Core Banking
systems.description: Account activation and management (migrated from legacy CBS in 2025)

discrepancies.description: Screening tool name differs: Flowchart says 'World-Check', DTP says 'World-Check ONE' (upgraded version)
Core banking system name differs: Flowchart says 'CBS', DTP says 'T24' (migrated in 2025)
Periodic review frequencies differ: Flowchart says '1yr/6mo/3mo', DTP says '36mo/12mo/6mo' (updated policy). Resolved: DTP values confirmed as correct by Process Owner.
EDD target differs: Flowchart says 'avg 5 days', DTP says 'target 3 days' (improved SLA)
Risk categories differ: Flowchart shows 3 levels (Low/Medium/High), DTP shows 4 levels (added 'Prohibited' in Q3 2025)
